name: Squalane
description: A biomimetic oil that mimics skin's natural sebum, derived from olives or sugarcane.
scientificSummary: Penetrates deeply to provide hydration without feeling heavy or causing breakouts.
mechanismOfAction: Penetrates deeply to provide hydration without feeling heavy or causing breakouts.
